summary: Test suite has a well-designed structure with good act integration and covers main happy paths (6 scenarios: basic matrix, include, exclude, full config, oversized, error). However, it misses significant edge cases: empty/non-list matrix dimensions, malformed JSON parsing, file-not-found errors, null values, and special characters. Tests only 2 of the 3 error types the implementation can raise. Depends on external fixture and workflow files not shown in the provided code, making it impossible to verify completeness. Regex-based section parsing is fragile. Would catch regressions in basic cartesian product and include/exclude logic, but would miss failures in dimension validation, JSON parsing, and file handling.
